case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BY & THROUGH ITS VS. PROMIA, INCORPORATED ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 57529350), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BY & THROUGH ITS PORT COMMISSION SERVED JUL-02-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PROMIA, INCORPORATED
